title: Tracking support apparatus, terminal, tracking support system, tracking support method and program
abstract: A tracking support system includes a position calculating section connected with a plurality of cameras arranged in a predetermined monitoring area to transmit video images imaged by the plurality of cameras and configured to calculate a position of the tracking target based on the video images received from the plurality of cameras; a tracker selecting section configured to select a tracker to be instructed to track the tracking target, based on position information of the terminal received from the terminal and the calculated position of the tracking target; and an information transmitting section configured to transmit information of a distance between the tracking target and the terminal during the tracking of the tracking target to the terminal carried by the selected tracker.
claims: 1. A tracking support apparatus comprising: a receiver configured to: receive position information of a plurality of terminals, each one of the plurality of terminals being carried by a tracker; receive confirmation information from a terminal of a current tracker instructed to track a tracking target, the confirmation information comprising position information where the current tracker confirms the tracking target; and receive a takeover notification that a current tracker requests takeover of tracking of a tracking target to a new tracker; a tracker selecting section configured to select a takeover tracker instructed to track the tracking target, using the position information of the plurality of terminals and the position information where the current tracker confirms the tracking target in the last confirmation information; and an information transmitting section configured to transmit information of a distance between the tracking target and the terminal during tracking of the tracking target to the terminal of the selected tracker, wherein the receiver is configured to receive, from the terminal of the current tracker, a notification of a monitoring failure, independently from the notification of the takeover notification, wherein the tracker selecting section is configured to select a search tracker instructed to search the tracking target, using the position information of the plurality of terminals and the position information where the current tracker confirms the tracking target in the last confirmation information, and wherein the information transmitting section is configured to transmit a search request to search the tracking target to a search terminal of the search tracker.
